name: warp-memory-marketplace
description: Session memory system that captures problem-solving patterns in Neo4j and serves them via MCP

metadata.description: Marketplace for the warp-memory plugin - a session memory system that captures problem-solving patterns in Neo4j and serves them via MCP

plugins.name: warp-memory
plugins.description: Session memory system for Claude Code. Captures problem-solving patterns, debugging strategies, and tool usage workflows from session transcripts and stores them in a Neo4j graph database. Query relevant memories via MCP in future sessions.
